shortBio: Started as a Quality Analyst testing SAP apps. Now I architect intelligent automation platforms with LangChain, Playwright, and vibe-coding. Still believe quality is a team sport — just with better tools.
fullBio: I've spent the last decade evolving from manual testing to architecting AI-powered automation systems — and I'm just getting started. What began as testing SAP applications at a small consultancy has transformed into designing end-to-end automation platforms that reduce manual effort by 80+%. I've earned the Breakthrough Achiever of the Year award at DevOn, led QE teams as a Scrum Master, and built automation frameworks across IoT, enterprise SaaS, and AI-native systems. My philosophy: quality isn't a phase — it's a culture. I use Shift Left principles to catch issues early, and AI tools like LangChain and DeepEval to make testing smarter, not just faster. I'm on a mission to prove that AI doesn't replace human judgment; it supercharges it. Whether I'm unblocking a sprint as Scrum Master or prototyping MCP integrations for LLMs, I'm driven by one question: how can we make this workflow 10x better?

subsections.heading: AI Engineering & Orchestration
items: Orchestration: LangChain, RAG systems, Model Context Protocol (MCP)
LLM Evaluation: DeepEval, Prompt Engineering, Local LLMs (Ollama)
Tools: GitHub Copilot, Azure AI, GenSpark

subsections.heading: Test Automation & Architecture
items: Strategy: Custom framework design, hybrid & data-driven architectures

subsections.heading: Full-Stack & Cloud Infrastructure
items: Development: Java, Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, Spring Boot, React
CI/CD: Jenkins, GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps

subsections.heading: Agile Leadership & Process
items: Roles: Certified Scrum Master (PSM I, CSM), Technical Lead
Action: Sprint planning, unblocking teams, retrospective facilitation
Culture: Cross-functional collaboration, mentoring, quality advocacy

sections.title: Leadership & Quality Philosophy
sections.content: I believe quality is a culture, not just a phase. I am a strong advocate for Shift Left testing; catching issues when they are cheapest to fix. My approach to leadership is to lead from the trenches: I enjoy deep technical work while stepping up to guide teams as a Scrum Master when required. I focus on unblocking barriers, fostering psychological safety, and empowering engineers and QAs to own quality together.

sections.title: Automation & Agent Engineering
sections.content: I design and build automation platforms that transform manual and repetitive workflows into intelligent, scalable systems. My focus is on end-to-end automation architecture, AI-powered workflow orchestration, and laying the foundation for agentic systems.

items.label: Workflow Automation Platforms
items.description: Architecting end-to-end automation platforms with test data synthesis, E2E test flows, one-click execution, and unified workflow validation spaces

items.label: AI-Powered Automation
items.description: Leveraging Vibe-coding, LLMs, and AI tools to intelligently design, optimize, and automate complex workflows and reduce manual effort by 80+%

items.label: Workflow Orchestration & Integration
items.description: Building robust automation ecosystems that integrate with CI/CD, testing tools, and enterprise systems for seamless workflow execution

items.label: Agent Development (In Progress)
items.description: Exploring agentic automation systems using Agent Framework and LLM orchestration to create self-directed, intelligent workflow agents

sections.title: AI-Native Engineering
sections.content: I am actively transitioning from traditional automation toward AI-driven engineering. I build systems for testing AI and LLMs; not just using AI tools, but creating systems that evaluate and ensure their reliability and safety.

items.label: RAG Systems
items.description: Building retrieval-augmented assistants with local LLMs for domain-specific testing and validations

items.label: LLM Reliability & Safety
items.description: Implementing Deepeval and evaluation pipelines to measure model quality, robustness, and fairness

items.label: MCP & Tooling Integrations
items.description: Prototyping Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations that embed LLMs into IDEs and testing workflows

items.label: Developer Velocity
items.description: Leveraging Copilot and AI assistant patterns to accelerate delivery while maintaining architectural rigor
